title: MobilDeniz Backend Developer (Hybrid)
company: Intertech Information Technology and Marketing Inc.
description: We will only consider applicants from the cities Istanbul, Ankara, İzmir and Bursa. In recent years, Intertech has been taking important steps towards acquiring technical systems focusing on the banking of the future and meeting the needs of the industry. With the platform transformation process, which is one of the most important examples of this, Intertech also designs technologies for future business models with high quality standards. We are looking for talented, passionate and agile minded team players to join our Software Development Teams. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science / Engineering or related fields, Minimum 3 years of experience in .NET development, Knowledge of C#, SQL is required, Experience in Web API, Experience building backend services that integrate with mobile applications (preferably in banking/financial sector) Strong knowledge on OOP, Design Patterns, Unit Testing, API Versioning, Preferably knowledgeable about distributed system, micro service, cloud based application architecture, Preferably knowledgeable about containerization and orchestration tools (Docker, Kubernetes, etc.). Preferably knowledgeable about Performance-oriented API design (low data usage, fast response times, optimized for mobile network conditions) Preferably knowledgeable about Mobile-specific data shaping (lightweight JSON responses, pagination, selective field exposure) Preferably previous close collaboration with mobile application teams (frontend-backend alignment, shaping APIs according to UI/UX needs) What You’ll Do You will be responsible for technical design and code development processes of software projects, You will participate development of business processes and support improvement of continuity and quality standards, You will implement design, development and maintenance of application, architectural structure and database to meet business needs. Why Intertech At Intertech, we are trying to make sure that you work free of worries with the benefits we offer; 📔 Continuous learning and development opportunities by working with experts and training facilities via Inter Academy, 💫 Opportunity to work in international projects, 🚀 Opportunity to work with new & trend technologies, 🕛 Flexible working hours (08:00-17:00, 09:00-18:00, 10:00-19:00), 🎆 Recreation space: Gym, PlayStation, pinball, table tennis, basketball court, coffee shop & cafe, resting rooms. 👕 No dress code. 🎉 Birthday Leave 💬 Language Allowance 🏢 5 Different Hub Offices (Bilişim Vadisi/İstanbul, Kurtköy Teknopark/İstanbul, Bilkent CYBERPARK/Ankara, DEPARK/İzmir, Esentepe Denizbank Genel Müdürlük) Our technology and innovative products have been recognized by the many prestigious national and international awards since 1987. Here's a selection of our latest achievements: 🥇 Bilişim 500 Awards 2025 • Special Contribution to the Turkish Economy Award – Turkey-Based Software Manufacturer, 1st Place • Finance and Banking Software Category, 1st Place • Turkey-Based Sectoral Software Manufacturer Category, 1st Place 🥇 Youth Awards 2025 • Silver Award – Most Admired Social Responsibility Project by Youth, From Waste to Future” Project 🥇 Future Cloud & AI Awards 2025 • Best Generative AI Award, Corporate Insight AI Project 🥇 YZ Arf Awards 2026 • Winner of the Innovative Project of the Year, MobilDeniz Vision Pro 📢 Contact us WebSite : http://www.intertech.com.tr LinkedIn: http://www.linkedin.com/company/intertechteyasam Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/intertechteyasam Youthall: https://www.youthall.com/en/intertech/ Medium: https://medium.com/intertechit Spotify: Spotify – Intertech You will be a member of a dynamic team and a big family. We say join us!

title: Lead Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Lead Backend Engineer to join our team. Lead Backend Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend systems that power our products and services. In this role, you will translate business and product requirements into robust technical solutions, ensuring high performance, reliability, and security across backend services. As a technical leader, you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including frontend developers, DevOps engineers, product managers, and solution architects to design and implement efficient, scalable, and maintainable backend architectures. If you are curious by nature, adaptive, collaborative, and always one step ahead, then join us and be a Commencer! Responsibilities Design, implement, and operate cloud-native AI/ML services that are secure, reliable, and cost-efficient ensuring that they meet the business objectives and adhere to service level agreements (SLA). Deploy and maintainAI applications on cloud- architecture. Build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) stacks: embeddings, vector stores, chunking, and evaluation. Create MLOps foundations: experiment tracking, model registry, CI/CD for data & models, and Infrastructure-as-Code. Investigate new techniques, tools, and methods that might increase efficiency among engineering & technology and cloud teams, as well as leading execution processes of topics evaluated & planned for roll-out. Collaborate with other technical leaders and business stakeholders to align all constraints and come up with solutions regarding project/product/initiative outputs. Be accountable for the reliability and security of cloud infrastructure and services. Provide visibility of performance, cost, and the security of cloud infrastructure and services. Drive continuous improvement, continuous delivery, and lean practices within the cloud team. Keep up to date on modern technologies and trends and advocate for their inclusion within products when it makes sense. Identify emerging technology solutions that reduce costs, increase efficiencies, enhance capabilities, reduce risk and improve security. Ensure that all cloud technology applications create a positive customer experience. Qualifications BS/MS degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related subject. Proven hands-on software engineering experience. Strong experience in Java development. Strong experience with Spring Framework, preferably Spring Boot. Hands-on experience in designing and developing enterprise-grade backend applications. Solid understanding of microservice architecture and distributed systems. Experience with event-driven architecture and asynchronous integration patterns. Strong knowledge of scalable, resilient and high-availability system design. Solid understanding of object-oriented analysis and design using common design patterns. Experience with RESTful APIs and backend integration patterns. Experience leading highly skilled software engineers and supporting team growth. Ability to coordinate effectively across multiple teams and stakeholders. Strong communication skills in English, both written and spoken. Team Lead and Agile Scrum experience is a strong plus. Preferred Qualifications Experience with containerized environments and CI/CD pipelines. Experience with monitoring, logging and observability tools in distributed systems. Familiarity with cloud-native architectures and modern backend infrastructure. Experience in performance optimization, system reliability and production support. Why Commencis? We want people to thrive at Commencis. Here’s what Commencers like about working here: Competitive Compensation & Benefits: We offer a competitive salary, private health insurance, pension and retirement plans through a company-backed pension system, meal card, commute compensation, work-from-home support, and a paid birthday off. Happier Weekdays: We offer flexible working hours, including a remote working option. Enjoy online events, guest speakers, office refreshments, a meeting-light culture, and many more perks to enhance your weekdays. Never Stop Learning: We support learning and development programs for almost anything. Additionally, we provide access to leading online e-learning platforms like Udemy and various libraries. Community & Socials: We are a tight-knit community that loves gathering together. Our social activities include happy hours, workshops, a New Year party, breakfast & lunch get-togethers, movie nights, and our Summer Festival. Open Culture: We maintain a flat organizational structure with a culture of direct and open communication. We value Commencers’ voices and address any suggestions and questions you may have. About Commencis Join us in paving the way for a thriving digital society! Commencis has more than two decades of expertise in the world of experience design, software engineering and cloud technologies. Our products and solutions are used by leading brands in financial services, insurance, airlines and retail in more than 20 countries. We help our clients around the globe to commence their next evolution and pave the way for a thriving digital society. We love discovering what’s next. We value collaboration, curiosity, and an open mindset at work. If you share the same passion with our fellow Commencers, then let us unleash your world-class potential! We will process your personal data as part of our recruitment procedures. To find out more, please consult our Candidate Privacy Notices . We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Java Developer
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a Full Stack Java Developer to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. As a Full Stack Java Developer at OBSS, you will work across back-end and front-end technologies to develop robust web applications, integrate services, and contribute to mission-critical projects in diverse industries. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams and lead development efforts where necessary. Main Responsibilities Develop and maintain complex program documentation, including structure diagrams, behavior diagrams, interaction diagrams, system/program flowcharts, test plans, and conversion plans. Review and improve the development and coding of Java programs and web applications, ensuring appropriate documentation. Conduct post-implementation reviews to confirm system and project objectives are met. Analyze existing systems and recommend new procedures or techniques to improve performance and maintainability. Communicate technical information effectively to technical and non-technical stakeholders, including external vendors, customers, and management. Lead medium-to-large technical teams to deliver high-quality software products on time. Integrate back-end services using REST APIs and ensure seamless front-end/back-end collaboration. Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Minimum 3 years of experience developing web services and applications across diverse industries. Strong back-end development experience with Java, Spring Framework (MVC, Boot, Data), JPA, Hibernate, and SQL. Front-end development experience with React and/or Vue.js, JavaScript/TypeScript. Knowledge of microservices architecture is a plus. Experience with web services: SOAP, RESTful, JSON, XML. Familiarity with Docker and design patterns (MVVM, Repository, Unit of Work, IoC, Dependency Injection) is highly desirable. Object-oriented development skills. Knowledge of AWS is a plus. Strong understanding of database management systems and data modeling (MSSQL, PostgreSQL preferred). Excellent communication, analytical, and teamwork skills. High energy, drive, and result-oriented mindset. Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Full Stack Java Developer (Banking)
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a Full Stack Java Developer with banking sector experience to join us and contribute to innovative digital banking solutions. As a Full Stack Java Developer at OBSS, you will design, develop, and maintain secure and compliant banking applications. You will work across back-end and front-end technologies, integrating complex systems and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions. Main Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain digital banking software solutions. Implement Java applications using Spring Framework (MVC, Boot, Data), JPA, Hibernate, and SQL. Develop responsive front-end components with React and/or Vue.js, JavaScript/TypeScript. Integrate back-end web services via REST and SOAP. Apply design patterns and microservices architecture principles. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure secure, efficient, and compliant application delivery. Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Minimum 3 years of full-stack development experience, preferably in the banking sector. Strong expertise in Java, Spring Framework, and front-end frameworks (React/Vue.js). Familiarity with Docker, AWS, MSSQL, PostgreSQL. Solid understanding of data modeling and integration. Knowledge of design patterns and microservices architecture. Excellent communication, analytical thinking, and teamwork skills. Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Backend Software Engineer
description: ERA RF Technologies is a technology-driven R&D and manufacturing company specializing in advanced RF communication systems for UAVs, satellite platforms, and mission-critical defense and commercial applications. As part of our internal digital transformation, we are developing in-house ERP systems, operational dashboards, and engineering software tools tightly integrated with our production, test, and configuration management workflows. We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer who will take technical ownership of backend architecture and service development within these systems. This role is ideal for engineers who value clean architecture, long-term maintainability, and building core systems from the ground up. Key Responsibilities Participating in the end-to-end architectural design and implementation of ERA’s internal ERP system Taking primary technical ownership of backend architecture, service layers, and business logic Designing and implementing RESTful APIs, microservices, and integration layers that support operational workflows Architecting backend components for real-time data streaming, logging, monitoring, and control mechanisms Implementing backend support for authentication, authorization, and role-based access control Making minor integration-level adjustments in existing frontend modules when required Contributing to technical documentation, automated testing, CI/CD, and deployment processes Ensuring clean code practices, scalability, performance, and long-term maintainability Actively participating in code reviews, architectural discussions, and system improvement initiatives Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field Minimum 2 years of professional backend software development experience Strong experience within the Node.js ecosystem Hands-on experience with NestJS, including modules, dependency injection, guards, pipes, and validation Solid knowledge of SQL-based databases, data modeling, query optimization, and transaction handling Strong understanding of RESTful API design, authentication/authorization flows, and system integrations Experience with real-time communication technologies (WebSocket, SSE, or similar) Familiarity with on-premise server architectures and data synchronization strategies Active, professional experience with Git and version-controlled workflows Ability to model business rules correctly at the service layer, ensuring data consistency and integrity Experience in log analysis, error diagnostics, and performance troubleshooting in live systems Good understanding of layered architecture and modular software design principles Preferred Qualifications Prior experience with ERP systems, production tracking, inventory management, or admin panel applications Experience with message queues (e.g., RabbitMQ) and caching mechanisms Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment workflows Experience with API security and fine-grained role-based authorization Hands-on experience with Docker and container-based development environments Familiarity with Linux server environments and basic deployment operations Strong sense of responsibility, ownership, and teamwork Ability to work systematically in a multidisciplinary engineering environment What We Offer A technology-focused, R&D-driven work environment with real engineering ownership Direct involvement in building core internal systems used company-wide Competitive compensation package Modern offices located in Teknopark İstanbul Comprehensive private health insurance Wedding, relocation, and childbirth support Energy (heating) assistance Birthday leave (additional paid day off) Complimentary gym membership
